news.headline: Elliott Advocacy unveils 2025 Readers' Choice Awards nominees, voting now open at elliottadvocacy.org/awards. Sponsored by Medjet.
news.summary: In New York, Elliott Advocacy, a nonprofit consumer advocacy organization, has revealed the nominees for the 2025 Readers’ Choice Awards. Voting for the awards has officially opened on their website. The awards, sponsored by Medjet, a prominent air medical transport and security response membership program for travelers, aim to acknowledge companies in different consumer sectors for their exceptional performance. To participate, visit https://elliottadvocacy.org/awards/. Stay tuned to see which companies secure the recognition this year.

news.headline: Chinese stocks perform poorly due to weak trade data amid concerns over a slowing economy. Imports drop 3.9% YoY to $214.87 billion, while exports grow 6.7%. Domestic demand remains weak, overshadowing Beijing's stimulus promises.
news.summary: U.S.-listed Chinese company stocks dipped on Tuesday following a brief rally, reflecting disappointing trade data from China. The country's imports plummeted by 3.9% in November to $214.87 billion, the most significant decrease in nine months, showcasing weakened domestic demand. Import growth in the first 11 months of 2024 was a mere 1.2%, reflecting subdued demand in a traditionally essential global trade market. Conversely, exports surged by 6.7% year-over-year, primarily driven by manufacturers looking to avoid potential new tariffs under the incoming U.S. administration. China's economy is facing challenges like weak domestic consumption and a housing crisis, dampening investor confidence despite promises of government intervention in 2024.

news.headline: UMass Memorial Health partners with AEYE Health for AI-based diabetic eye care, EMR integration. NY, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: The recent passing of Dr. James Ledwith is being commemorated in New York on December 10, 2024. AEYE Health, a prominent provider of AI-driven solutions for retinal imaging, has joined forces with UMass Memorial Health (UMMH), the primary not-for-profit healthcare network in Central Massachusetts. This collaboration signifies a pivotal moment in the industry wherein cutting-edge technologies will be utilized to enhance medical diagnostics.

news.headline: Derive launches new cyber risk assessment platform to replace CISOs. Redefining cybersecurity leadership.
news.summary: A cutting-edge cyber risk assessment platform has been unveiled in Richmond, Virginia on December 10, 2024. Derive's new platform aims to revolutionize cybersecurity measures by providing a data-focused alternative for Chief Information Security Officers. This launch marks a significant step forward in enhancing digital security practices.

news.headline: University of Denver boosts Colorado with $2.3 billion in economic impact through research and community engagement.
news.summary: A recent economic impact report reveals that the University of Denver (DU) contributes approximately $2.3 billion to Colorado's economy each year. This significant financial impact is attributed to DU's distinct two-campus learning model, outstanding research endeavors, and active engagement in the community. The report highlights the university's crucial role in supporting the state's economic growth and development.

news.headline: Ramp adds Crumbl, MIXT, OLIPOP as customers to improve operations and financial efficiency.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance financial efficiency, Crumbl, MIXT, and OLIPOP have selected Ramp to streamline operations. This decision was made public on December 10, 2024 in New York. Ramp, a finance operations platform focused on reducing costs for businesses, confirmed its partnership with the three well-known food & beverage retailers. This move reflects the companies' drive to optimize their processes and improve financial performance.

news.headline: Lung Cancer Research Foundation awards $3.55 million in research grants, total funding for 2024 reaches $3.87 million.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 10, 2024, the Lung Cancer Research Foundation (LCRF) revealed that they have granted $3.55 million in new research awards through their 2024 Scientific Grant Program. This brings the total annual funding awarded by the foundation to $3.87 million. The LCRF expressed their satisfaction in being able to support innovative research projects in the field of lung cancer with this substantial amount of funding.

news.headline: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. and CoSara Diagnostics launch new oligo facility to support "Make in India". Ribbon-cutting event to host NGO and govt. reps. SALT LAKE CITY, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A recently established oligonucleotide facility is created to bolster the "Make in India" campaign through internal synthesis of Co-Primers®. The inauguration ceremony is anticipated to see the attendance of individuals from NGOs, along with governmental officials. This development is taking place in Salt Lake City on December 10, 2024, as Co-Diagnostics, Inc. takes the initiative.

news.headline: Assisted Living Locators aids seniors in celebrating holidays with joy and connection, as many feel isolated; spreading cheer.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on December 10, 2024, it was reported that the holiday season is typically filled with joy and connection, but seniors may experience feelings of isolation or nostalgia for past traditions. Assisted Living Locators, a prominent company operating across the country, aims to support seniors during this time.

news.headline: Clean Juice plans to expand USDA-Certified Organic juice options in Central Texas, including Austin and San Antonio.
news.summary: A popular organic juice bar known as Clean Juice is planning to expand its franchise opportunities in Austin, San Antonio, and other locations. This original USDA-certified organic juice bar announced its strategic expansion plans on December 10, 2024. The franchise is aiming to enter new markets in Central Texas and beyond.

news.headline: Merit Financial Advisors partners with Trinity Financial Partners to grow in Pennsylvania, targeting high-net-worth individuals.
news.summary: An advisory firm in Georgia, Merit Financial Advisors, focusing on financial planning and wealth management for high-net-worth clients and those in life transitions, revealed on December 10, 2024, that...

news.headline: Echo Global Logistics named a 2024 Chicagoland Top Workplace by Chicago Tribune. Headquarters recognized; specializes in transportation and supply chain services.
news.summary: Chicago, on December 10, 2024 - Echo Global Logistics, Inc. received recognition from the Chicago Tribune for its headquarters located in Chicago. Echo, a prominent provider of technology-enabled services for transportation and supply chain management, was awarded this honor. The company's Chicago headquarters stood out for its exceptional work in the industry. The recognition highlights Echo's commitment to excellence in the field.

news.headline: Evive Brands has all four of its brands listed in Franchise Dictionary Magazine's Top 100 Game Changers of 2024.
news.summary: Scottsdale, AZ - On December 10, 2024, Evive Brands revealed that its four brands - Assisted Living Locators, Executive Home Care, Grasons, and The Brothers that just do Gutters - have secured spots in the prestigious Top 100 Game Changers list for 2024 as recognized by Franchise Dictionary Magazine. This recognition serves as a testament to the brands' significant impact and success in their respective markets.

news.headline: Global hiring plans for Q1 2025 stable: Net Employment Outlook same as Q4 2024, strongest in Americas (29%) and Asia Pacific (27%).
news.summary: The employment forecast for the first quarter of 2025 is steady compared to the fourth quarter of 2024, although it has decreased from the previous year, indicating a trend of slowdown in the job market. Regional analysis shows consistent hiring intentions, with the Americas at 29% displaying the most positive outlook, trailed by Asia Pacific at 27%.

news.headline: Vow ASA announces subscription period for underwritten rights issue of 166,666,666 new shares at NOK 1.50 per share.
news.summary: Oslo, December 10, 2024: Vow ASA recently announced the launch of a fully underwritten rights issue involving 166,666,666 new shares at a subscription price of NOK 1.50 per share. This event was followed by the distribution of subscription rights to select primary insiders and their close associates. The Rights Issue was finalized on December 10, 2024, determining the allocation of the new shares in the "Transaction."

news.headline: HII and Job Corps collaborate to offer careers at Ingalls Shipbuilding. 120 students interviewed across 20 states, 68 received job offers.
news.summary: In Pascagoula, Mississippi on December 10, 2024, HII’s (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division collaborated with the U.S. Department of Labor’s Job Corps program to organize a recruitment event spanning two days. This event aimed to provide students with a clear pathway to employment in the shipbuilding sector. More than 120 students from 20 different states participated, undergoing interviews for various trade positions such as welding, electrical work, and machining. Following the event, 68 students were successfully offered jobs to commence their careers at HII.

news.headline: Unite Us releases upgraded analytics product in NYC, User Performance Dashboard with robust metrics for social care organizations.
news.summary: A recent launch in New York introduces the New User Performance Dashboard by Unite Us, a platform that provides comprehensive metrics and tools to support social care organizations. This initiative showcases the company's dedication to addressing the challenges faced by these organizations.

news.headline: Cycode warns of escalating tool sprawl in appsec, hindering visibility, widening talent gap, per 2025 State of ASPM Report.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Cycode, an Application Security Posture Management (ASPM) leader, published its second annual State of ASPM Report. The report exposes a significant gap between increasing application security threats and organizations' preparedness. Compared to the previous year's study, this report highlights a troubling rise in tool sprawl, financial strains, and a growing shortage of skilled professionals in maintaining application security posture.

news.headline: Windstream Wholesale, VIAVI secure world's first 800G transatlantic trial with Colt and Nokia. Over 8,500 km covered.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Windstream Wholesale, a top provider of advanced network solutions, revealed in October the successful execution of the world's initial 800 Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) transatlantic service trial. This endeavor was completed in collaboration with Colt Technology Services and Nokia. VIAVI Solutions Inc. played a crucial role by offering state-of-the-art testing solutions and technical knowledge, leading to a swift and effortless implementation. The trial spanned over 8,500 kilometers.

news.headline: Guided Therapeutics receives order and full payment from Indonesia for 4 LuViva Systems and 1,200 disposables. Delivery expected in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Peachtree Corners, Georgia, Guided Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that they have finalized payment with their Indonesian distribution partner for four LuViva devices and 1,200 single-use cervical guides. These medical tools are set to be delivered in the first quarter of 2025. The initial shipment aims to support the government healthcare system in Sulawesi by identifying women with cervical conditions. The company behind this, known for their LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan, operates under the stock symbol OTCQB: GTHP.

news.headline: SupplyClub launches GreenBux program, offering discounts and carbon offset opportunities for customers. SupplyClub PRO members can now avail benefits.
news.summary: SupplyClub, a leading sustainable B2B packaging supply company based in New York, introduced a new rewards program called GreenBux on December 10, 2024. This initiative aims to provide discounts and opportunities for customers to offset carbon footprint. The program is available to all SupplyClub PRO members, offering various benefits such as discounts on purchases and opportunities to participate in carbon offset projects.Customers can now enjoy these perks as part of SupplyClub's commitment to promoting sustainability and providing value to its clientele.

news.headline: News report highlights Ascentage Pharma's Bcl-2 inhibitor Lisaftoclax with encouraging data in R/R MM, including a median PFS over 9 months.
news.summary: A global biopharmaceutical company, Ascentage Pharma (6855.HK), based in ROCKVILLE, Md. and SUZHOU, China, revealed on Dec. 10, 2024, its focus on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies for global unmet medical needs, particularly malignancies. The company, involved in tackling critical health issues, announced an important development.

news.headline: Novo secures land in Onslow, WA for strategic development. Great news for the company and the region.
Aireon secures spectrum license for space-based VHF services in aviation, filing with regulators for an enhanced satellite constellation.
news.summary: Aireon, a prominent player in aviation data products and services, recently achieved a major milestone in its efforts to introduce space-based VHF services to the aviation sector by filing for a spectrum license with regulators. This filing, submitted to the International Telecommunication Union (ITU) through Canadian spectrum regulator Innovation, Science and Economic Development (ISED), outlines Aireon's proposal for an upgraded satellite network comprising VHF components. This move signifies a significant step forward for Aireon in its mission to revolutionize aviation communication and safety.

news.headline: SailPoint hailed as top Identity and Access Governance leader by KuppingerCole Analysts - sweeping all major categories.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SailPoint Technologies, Inc., a prominent provider of unified identity security solutions for businesses, has recently received outstanding recognition in the latest Leadership Compass Identity and Access Governance (IAG) report by KuppingerCole Analysts. The company secured the top position across all key categories, being identified as an Overall Leader, Product Leader, Innovation Leader, and Market Leader. This exceptional achievement designates SailPoint as a “Leader,” the most esteemed status attainable for a vendor, in all four evaluated areas in the report. This unparalleled success underscores SailPoint's unparalleled expertise in the realm of identity and access governance.

news.headline: Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP) declares $0.546875 per share dividend on 8.75% Series A Preferred Stock, payable Dec 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on December 10, 2024, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP) disclosed a dividend of $0.546875 per share on its 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, which offers petroleum products, crude oil, and drybulk seaborne transportation services. The dividend is slated for payment on December 30, 2024, to shareholders on record as of December 24, 2024. This dividend pertains to the period between the last dividend payment date for the Series A Preferred Shares on September 30, 2024, and December 29, 2024.

news.headline: Nexalus partners with HPE to introduce liquid cooling in servers, aiming to make data centers energy-efficient and environmentally friendly.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland, Nexalus, a top-tier provider of advanced liquid cooling solutions, revealed a partnership with the OEM division of Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE). The deal involves incorporating Nexalus’ innovative liquid cooling technology, known for its energy efficiency, into HPE’s range of servers. This joint effort is geared towards tackling the escalating energy consumption and environmental impact of data centers. Currently, the data center sector is responsible for emitting over 100 million tonnes of CO2e every year. The ultimate goal of this collaboration is to revolutionize data centers from being energy consumers to becoming environmentally sustainable entities.

news.headline: Solaris Energy Infrastructure, Inc. has priced an underwritten public offering of 6.5 million Class A common stock at $24.75 each.
news.summary: In Houston, SEI has disclosed the pricing for its underwritten public offering of 6.5 million Class A common stock at $24.75 per share.

news.headline: Riot Platforms raises $525 million via private convertible debt to buy bitcoins, plans to use proceeds for more bitcoins and general corporate purposes.
news.summary: Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms, Inc (NASDAQ:RIOT) has priced its upsized private offering of $525 million 0.75% convertible senior notes due 2030, with an additional option for the initial purchasers to acquire up to $75 million more. The offering, originally set at $500 million, is expected to close on December 11, 2024. The net proceeds, likely around $511.5 million, will be used by Riot to acquire more bitcoins and for general corporate purposes. The notes will accrue interest at 0.75% per year, paid semiannually.

news.headline: Atlanta addiction center No Longer Bound partners with networking app to combat isolation, enhancing recovery chances. MAR 10, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: A group of men undergoing recovery at No Longer Bound in Roswell, Georgia, now have access to a new app that is helping them stay connected, improving their chances of staying sober. The app, developed by Atlanta startup Connector Technologies, offers various features to help build and sustain relationships within the recovery community. This innovation is expected to significantly enhance the men's likelihood of maintaining sobriety. The development was announced on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: South Africa FMCG revenue affected by consumer spending pressure despite retail sales benefit from reduced loadshedding - ResearchAndMarkets.com. Retail sector contributed nearly R1.4bn to South Africa's economy in 2024.
news.summary: A report titled "FMCG Trends in South Africa 2024" has been recently included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. Providing insights into the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) sector, the report covers various aspects including FMCG sales, pricing dynamics, affordability, adoption of private labels, the ongoing trend of online retail, utilization of technology, and the prevalence of spaza shops. Additionally, it delves into topics such as sustainability practices, the demand for health-conscious products, strategies to combat food wastage and loss, as well as the prevalent challenges and competition within the industry. Notably, in 2022, the retail sector made a substantial contribution of nearly R1.4 billion in sales to the South African economy.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi regulators approved Tether’s USD₮ as a virtual asset. This allows access to USDT financial services.
news.summary: Regulators at Abu Dhabi Global Market have given their approval for Tether's USD₮ to be recognized as a virtual asset, paving the way for the provision of USDT financial services. This development signifies a significant milestone for Tether within the UAE, with the approval serving as an acknowledgment of the increasing importance of digital assets in the financial sector. This decision allows for the utilization of Tether's stablecoin, denoted as USD₮, in various financial transactions and services, further contributing to the growth of the digital asset market.

news.headline: Bybit adds SUI to On-Chain Earn, allowing users to stake for rewards, world's 2nd largest exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on December 10, 2024, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, has introduced SUI to its On-Chain Earn platform. This update enables users to engage in blockchain security measures and earn staking rewards. This announcement signifies an important milestone for Bybit as it continues to expand its offerings to its clientele.

news.headline: Hawaii partners with Bamboo Health to improve PDMP, aiming to reduce drug overdoses for providers and pharmacists.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, the State of Hawaii has collaborated with Bamboo Health™, a pioneer in Real-Time Care Intelligence™, to assist physicians and pharmacists in mitigating the threat of drug overdoses. This partnership involves improved integration of the Prescription Drug Monitoring Program (PDMP) with electronic health records (EHRs) and pharmacy management systems utilized by healthcare professionals and pharmacists across Hawaii. This advancement enables providers and pharmacies across the state to conveniently access PDMP data.

news.headline: HWH International Inc. partners with Guangzhou Inbot Technology Ltd through its subsidiary, Hapi iRobot Pte. Ltd. for global robotics expansion.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Bethesda, MD, HWH International Inc. (Nasdaq: HWH) disclosed a noteworthy development. The company has successfully finalized a strategic partnership deal with Guangzhou Inbot Technology Ltd, a prominent robotics firm. This agreement was facilitated through HWH’s wholly owned subsidiary, Hapi iRobot Pte. Ltd. (HIPL). The partnership marks a crucial milestone in enhancing worldwide availability of state-of-the-art robotics solutions.

news.headline: Actelis Networks chosen for Seattle's ITS upgrade in infrastructure modernization project for "smartest city," Seattle.
news.summary: Actelis has been chosen to enhance and extend Seattle's Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) through a significant asset renewal project.

news.headline: Wealthy investors view Trump's tariff threats as a strategic bargaining tool, says key money managers.
Tyler Technologies awarded AWS State/Local Government Partner of the Year for 2024 at Geography & Global AWS Partner Award.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Tyler Technologies was recently announced as the recipient of the prestigious 2024 Geography and Global AWS Partner Award. This recognition showcases the company's dedication and success in leveraging technology to deliver exceptional services. Tyler Technologies' achievement underscores their leadership and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: ResearchAndMarkets.com releases Top 100 World Mattress Manufacturers Report for 2024. Insights on global market with rankings.
news.summary: A report titled "Top 100 Mattress Manufacturers in the World" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report provides insights into the global mattress industry's competitive landscape, highlighting the top 100 producers and analyzing the market. It includes rankings based on mattress turnover and details such as company names, headquarters location (country), and other relevant data. This comprehensive report offers a detailed overview for industry players, covering key information about the leading mattress manufacturers globally.

news.headline: Medical Care Technologies Inc. plans to change its name and ticker symbol by filing a FINRA application.
news.summary: In Mesa, Arizona, on December 10, 2024, a press release was issued by Medical Care Technologies Inc. regarding their collaboration with Infinite Auctions LLC (OTC PINK: MDCE). The company has expressed its plan to submit an official application to FINRA for a change in corporate name and ticker symbol.

news.headline: 12th Annual Golden Haiku Competition opens today in DC, accepting entries till Jan 19. Selected haikus to go on display in Golden Triangle neighborhood this spring. Workshop planned next month.
news.summary: This spring, a collection of chosen haiku poems will be showcased in the Golden Triangle neighborhood of Washington DC. The 12th annual international haiku competition, organized by the Golden Triangle Business Improvement District, has commenced accepting submissions as of today, December 10, 2024. Writers have until January 19 to submit their entries for consideration in the competition.

news.headline: AGCO Corp (NYSE: AGCO) announces retirement of SVP Bob Crain, General Manager of Grain & Protein division.
news.summary: In Duluth, Georgia on December 10, 2024, AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO), a renowned company specializing in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, revealed that Bob Crain, the Senior Vice President (SVP) and General Manager of Grain & Protein, would...

news.headline: Travel Guard announces winner of "World's Unluckiest Traveler® Contest 2024" in Houston, with hundreds of submissions.
news.summary: In Houston on December 10, 2024, hundreds of travelers shared their nightmarish travel experiences to compete for the title of the worst. Travel Guard, in a recurring initiative, invited submissions of travel mishaps to determine the most harrowing story.

news.headline: CanPay partners with NuggMD to offer benefits for customers in Pennsylvania. Collaboration announced on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Two prominent cannabis technology companies have joined forces to simplify the process of renewing medical cannabis recommendations for customers in Pennsylvania. The partnership between CanPay and NuggMD offers benefits for consumers starting on December 10, 2024. This collaboration aims to enhance the experience for customers in the state, providing them with more convenient options for renewing their medical cannabis recommendations.

news.headline: Qmerit in 2024 focusing on EVs, Solar, Battery, Electrical Services growth with new alliances and launches.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on December 10, 2024, Qmerit, known as the top provider in North America for implementing and integrating services for EV charging and various energy transition technologies, revealed a successful year of partnerships and product releases aimed at accelerating the expansion of the industry.

news.headline: The Brothers that just do Gutters in Scottsdale urge homeowners to reflect on gutter maintenance; stress its importance.
news.summary: In December 10, 2024, in Scottsdale, The Brothers that just do Gutters are urging homeowners to review their efforts in maintaining gutters as the year ends. It is recommended to establish proactive resolutions for home care in the upcoming year. Maintaining gutters is crucial for overall home upkeep.

news.headline: Raptive chooses TripleLift as preferred SSP for all media buys. Partnership targets agencies and brands through 2026.
news.summary: Starting from today, a new partnership has been formed to target agencies and brands until 2026 in New York. TripleLift, the ad tech platform known for enhancing digital advertising on all screens, has revealed it is partnering with Raptive, a full-service creator. This collaboration is set to focus on expanding their reach to agencies and brands during the mentioned timeframe.

news.headline: Zone & Co unveils survey showing finance leaders lose 5% of annual revenue to manual OTC tasks, advocate automation.
news.summary: A recent survey has shown that finance executives are losing approximately 5% of their yearly revenue due to manual tasks related to order to cash processes. The survey also indicates that these leaders believe automation is the key solution to this issue. This data comes from Zone & Co, a prominent provider of ERP software solutions for CFOs. Today, they released results from their 2024 study conducted in New York City.

news.headline: IMO Health wins 2 Best in Business Awards for data analytics and healthcare IT at Modern Healthcare's event on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Chicago, IMO Health was honored with two prestigious 2024 Best in Business Awards for excellence in data analytics and healthcare IT. The awards, bestowed by Modern Healthcare on December 9, 2024, recognize IMO Health's commitment to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Ascentage Pharma presents updated data on Bcl-2 inhibitor Lisaftoclax showing clinical benefits for MDS.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a global biopharmaceutical company, Ascentage Pharma (6855.HK), based in Rockville, Md. and Suzhou, China, shared news of their focus on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapies for malignancies worldwide. The company unveiled plans for addressing global unmet medical needs, with a strong emphasis on oncology.
